property_scores.rationale: Precise match: affordable private HE for underserved markets is explicitly stated. Provincial footprint, first-gen focus, board exam specialization all evidence-backed.

property_scores.label: Value Chain Position
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: downstream end-service-provider (direct delivery to students). Teaching hospital is also end-service. No upstream licensing/platform play.

property_scores.label: Industry Maturity
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: growth phase with specific data (20.23% CAGR, $154M→$847M by 2034). Tailwinds identified. Regional expansion confirms growth not maturity.

property_scores.label: Revenue Model
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: recurring tuition (quasi-subscription per year). 89% retention supports recurrence claim. Hospital services as secondary stream noted.

property_scores.label: Delivery Model
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: physical in-person delivery + early digital augmentation (Learning App). No online-only programs. Active Learning methodology requires campus presence.

property_scores.label: Cost Structure
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: fixed-cost-heavy (faculty, facilities) + moderate capex (recent building acquisitions). 'Bare-bones' philosophy supports cost control claim. 23% net margin confirms disciplined execution.

property_scores.label: Company Age
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: established (8-20 years) — 22 years in education operations. Clear institutional history and brand equity.

property_scores.rationale: Precise match: massive (100K+) at 177,851 enrolled students. Record enrollment with YoY growth. Multiple geographic distribution.

property_scores.label: Competitive Stance
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: market leader in affordable Philippine private HE. Self-described as largest in SE Asia by enrollment. 20-year head start in acquisition-turnaround model.

property_scores.label: Go-to-Market Motion
property_scores.rationale: Clear match: reputation/word-of-mouth + community-led (board exam rankings, scholarship programs, Facebook local engagement, student success stories). No paid digital advertising visible; slight generic in 'reputation' label itself.

property_scores.label: Customer Concentration
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: diversified (177,851 individual student customers). No single customer material. Government subsidies distributed across enrolled base.

property_scores.label: Pricing Position
property_scores.rationale: Clear match: value/low-cost positioning with Hawak Kamay scholarship (5,500 PHP ~$100 USD) and 'bare-bones' philosophy. Full tuition range across all programs not detailed; slight gap in comprehensiveness.

property_scores.label: Leadership Model
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: founder-era CEO (Chito Salazar) with dual-hat authority. Founding architect of education network with unusual power across education + parent corp.

property_scores.label: Organizational Shape
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: hub-and-spoke topology. Central HQ + semi-autonomous campuses retaining local identity. Shared curriculum and financial oversight. Clear reporting structure evident.

property_scores.label: Workforce Model
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: multi-site co-located (campus-based). Faculty and staff physically based at institutions. Central HQ in Makati. No remote-first culture.

property_scores.label: Talent Profile
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: domain-expert-heavy (educators, healthcare professionals, board-exam specialists). Active Learning requires trained instructors. Faculty development is core investment.

property_scores.label: Stack Generation
property_scores.rationale: Precise identification: transitional stack with Mastersoft ERP Solutions (package ID com.iitms.phinma), Lenovo DaaS, no cloud-native architecture. Evidence is specific and well-documented; medium confidence reflects architecture age, not coverage.

property_scores.label: Engineering Practices
property_scores.rationale: Clear vendor-managed model: PHINMA Learning App built by Mastersoft (not internal), Lenovo manages devices, no internal engineering team visible. Evidence is precise; medium confidence reflects outsourced nature, not coverage.

property_scores.label: Data Infrastructure
property_scores.rationale: Clear scope: ERP-native reporting (Mastersoft SIS, sis.phinma.edu.ph, pensms.phinma.edu.ph, Google Analytics). Metrics tracked precisely (89% retention, board exam topnotchers) but no data warehouse, BI tools, or ML infrastructure visible. Reasonable but not advanced.

property_scores.label: Security Posture
property_scores.rationale: Clear baseline: basic-to-intermediate (Privacy Policy, HTTPS, Data Privacy Act compliance mandated, Lenovo managed endpoint security, healthcare data subject to DOH). No SOC2/ISO27001 certifications visible. Compliance-driven, not competitive advantage.

property_scores.label: Regulatory Burden
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: heavy regulatory burden. CHED accreditation, PRC licensing (healthcare), separate Indonesia DIKTI framework, Data Privacy Act, DOH hospital regs. Multiple jurisdictions and domains.

property_scores.label: Geographic Scope
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: regional (Philippines + Indonesia). 11 PH institutions + 2 Indonesia institutions. Stated 5-country expansion target over 5 years (additional ASEAN). Clear multi-jurisdiction operations.

property_scores.label: Macroeconomic Sensitivity
property_scores.rationale: Clear with some gaps: recession-resistant (inelastic demand for affordable education + government subsidies) but with FX exposure (IDR vs PHP/USD). Macro framework clear but specific sensitivity metrics limited.

property_scores.label: Governance Obligations
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: PE-backed with public parent (PSE: PHN). SEC reporting via PHINMA Corp + KKR's UN SDG alignment requirements. Clear governance constraints beyond normal commercial logic.

property_scores.label: Innovation Posture
property_scores.rationale: Clear with some gaps: pragmatic (ROI-driven, evidence-based). 'Bare-bones' ethos is conservative, not experimental. Learning App and AI tablet donation show adoption readiness but not bleeding-edge culture. KKR mandate may shift posture.

property_scores.label: Brand Positioning & Tone
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: mission/community-driven. 'Making lives better through education' is core positioning. Student transformation stories, SDG framing, community bayanihan campaigns. Mission structurally constrains pricing and location decisions.

property_scores.label: Public Values & Mission
property_scores.rationale: Precise match: mission-driven (mission constrains commercial decisions). Turns down urban markets for underserved provinces. Core values prominently published. Executive home visits cultural practice. KKR chosen for SDG 4 alignment.

property_scores.label: Employer Brand & Talent Signal
property_scores.rationale: Clear with some gaps: stable/mission-attractive in niche. Glassdoor 3.4/5, 53% recommend, strong culture (4.0/5) + mission alignment attraction. Trade-offs: entry-level salaries below market, work-life balance gaps. Medium confidence reflects limited public data on employer brand depth.

summary.scoring_notes: Overall score 0.82 reflects strong coverage across strategic dimensions with precise, evidence-backed assessments. Strengths: industry clarity (1.0), org structure (1.0), culture/values (0.89), operating environment (0.92). Improvements: business-model completeness (2/5 missing), tech-maturity more precise (0.77, vendor-managed model well-documented), market-position comprehensive (0.84). Growth-phase remains sparse (0.14 placeholder). Profile demonstrates mature, mission-driven education operator with clear market position but limited technical modernization.
